author: Salig Ram, Babu
title: Darbari Ilmun-Nisa
gloss: For subject see entry No. 20 at page 18 of the catalogue for the quarter ending the 30th September 1909.
copyright: Babu Salig Ram, Ludhiána, No. 8(?), dated the 4th July 1910.

title: Basarat-i-Tulaba
gloss: A translation by Lala Rang Behari Lal, B. A., B. T., of Dr. C. C. Caleb's 'Eyesight in Schools'.
copyright: The Punjab Text-Book Committee, Lahore; No. 145(?), dated the 6th September 1910.
notes: Entry preceded by '[Designed for Educational purposes.]'. School-hygiene translation (Caleb's Eyesight in Schools).

author: Abdul Rahman Shaikh
title: Ahsan-ul-Tasawwuf
gloss: A book on mysticism in which different stages of it have been explained for the guidance of beginners.
notes: URDU—MISCELLANEOUS serials continue from Q2 (80 ff.). Dual date: 1328 Hijri / July 1910. Sufi instruction manual.

title: Akhwan-us-Safa
gloss: A booklet in which the superiority of mankind over all other created things is dealt with, translated from the original in Arabic.
notes: Translation from the Brethren of Purity (Ikhwan al-Safa); publisher is editor of the newspaper Millat.

author: Ali Muhammad Khan, Mirza
title: Jughrafiya-i-Shimal-Maghribi Suba-i-Sarhaddi
gloss: A geography of the North-West Frontier Province for the use of the students of Lower Primary Schools.
publisher: Author, who is Personal Assistant to Inspector-General of Education, North-West Frontier Province
notes: Entry preceded by '(Designed for Educational purposes.)'. Same education-official author as Guldasta-i-Ta'lim (p30 s7).

title: Anjaman-i-Muallamin-i-Zila-i-Lahore ke Ijlas ki roidad
gloss: The proceedings of the meetings of the Teachers' Association, Lahore district, held during 9th March 1909 to 10th May 1910, compiled by Lala Nihal Chand, District Inspector of Schools, Lahore.
publisher: The compiler, who is Secretary of the Association
notes: Teachers' association proceedings — professional associational life in print; 200 copies.

author: Devi Dayal, Lala
title: Dudh
gloss: A booklet on milk and cattle.
copyright: The Imperial Book Depôt, Delhi; No. 8(?), dated the 7th July 1910.

author: Devi Dayal, Lala
title: Ghas Chara
copyright: The Imperial Book Depôt, Delhi; No. 9(?), dated the 7th July 1910.
notes: Author dash-continuation of serial 84. Agricultural improvement literature (fodder), 4th edition.
